shared_npcs.name: Harold Longfingers
shared_npcs.tactics: Fires first sight, then yells, 'Intruder!' Can kneel down for cover to add +2 AC. Stays in the front center of the roof — never moves from his reinforced spot. Only the top of his head can be seen from atop the paddlewheel.
shared_npcs.roleplay_notes: Bushy sideburns. Harold is not very bright and agrees with whatever is said. Wears padded armor. Carries 20 arrows.
